extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won a photo finish from the breakaway on Moosalp after 18km climb neutralized all late attacks with no GC changes.
tactical_patterns: Israel Premier Tech refused to chase despite Fulsang's 1-second GC lead, preserving team resources over defending yellow.
Ineos burned Martinez domestique work despite Pidcock COVID withdrawal, suggesting thin climbing depth for Thomas's GC defense.
Thomas forced late sprint with 400m remaining attempting GC split, revealing desperation for bonus seconds on summit finish.
Simmons bridged 11.2km deficit on 18km climb, showing recovery ability after being dropped suggests pacing error not form.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: only 1-second deficit but needed domestique support and failed sprint gambit shows no superiority over Fulsang
rider_signals.FULSANG Jakob: neutral: Chased down Schachmann personally rather than relying on teammates, concerning workload management for race leader
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: negative: COVID withdrawal cost Ineos crucial mountain support when Thomas needed resources on 18km climb
rider_signals.SIMMONS Quinn: positive: Bridged 11km gap after being dropped suggests either pacing intelligence or exceptional recovery capacity
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: First WT win on HC climb breakaway shows emerging climbing capability beyond domestique expectations
